'''Trillka''' was a repair-shop owner on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kalarba/Legends|Kalarba]]. She fixed [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO's]] head plate in a way that made him look like the [[Assassin droid/Legends|assassin droid]] [[C-3PX]]. Later, when the criminal [[Olag Greck]] tried to blow up [[Hosk Station/Legends|Hosk Station]], she foiled the scheme by undoing the sabotage to the power core.<ref name="D3" />
